results.rendered_html: bhaṭṭinī f. (fr. bhartṛ, Prākṛ. bhaṭṭā; formed in analogy to patnī) a noble lady (applied to queens not crowned or consecrated like the Devī, to the wife of a Brāhman and any woman of high rank),  L.

results.rendered_html: bhaṭṭinī (prākritisch das entsprechende f. zu bhartar, bei dessen Bildung man vielleicht auch patnī vor Augen gehabt hat) f. hohe Frau, ungeweihte Gemahlinnen eines Fürsten und Brahmanenfrauen bezeichnend,  AK. 1,1,7,13 .  H. 334 . an. 3,396 .  MED. n. 100 .  HALĀY. 2 . 325 .

results.rendered_html:
bhaṭṭinī
1 A queen (not crowned), a princess; (often used in dramas by maidservants in addressing a queen).
2 A lady of high rank.
3 The wife of a Brāhmaṇa.
